name: Wolfhouse Booking Assistant - Main - Shared Engine Dry Run

meta.description: Stage 8.5.7 dry-run fork. NOT a replacement for the live workflow. INACTIVE / NOT IMPORTED into production n8n. Proves the shared Staff API booking/pricing/payment engine can be called by the Luna bot. All WhatsApp send nodes are bypassed. Selected bed codes use staging placeholder DEMO-R1-B1 (gap: auto-assignment not yet built — see GAP note in Code - Parse Booking Fields node). Token from LUNA_BOT_INTERNAL_TOKEN env var, never hardcoded. WHATSAPP_DRY_RUN guard is the first branch.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "error": "dry_run_guard_blocked", "detail": "WHATSAPP_DRY_RUN is not true; refusing to run shared-engine dry-run path" }

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  client_slug:     $json.client_slug,
  phone:           $json.phone,
  guest_name:      $json.guest_name,
  email:           $json.email,
  check_in:        $json.check_in,
  check_out:       $json.check_out,
  guest_count:     $json.guest_count,
  package_code:    $json.package_code,
  room_type:       $json.room_type,
  payment_choice:  $json.payment_choice,
  add_ons:         $json.add_ons,
  language:        $json.language,
  source:          'luna_whatsapp'
}) }}

nodes.name: Set - Log Missing Fields Reply DryRun

assignments.name: note
assignments.value: DryRun: WhatsApp send bypassed. In live flow Luna would send reply_draft to guest.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ dry_run: true, result: 'missing_fields', next_action: $json.next_action, missing_fields: JSON.parse($json.missing_fields || '[]'), reply_draft: $json.reply_draft, whatsapp_sent: false }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  client_slug:        $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.client_slug,
  phone:              $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.phone,
  guest_name:         $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.guest_name,
  email:              $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.email,
  check_in:           $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.check_in,
  check_out:          $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.check_out,
  guest_count:        $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.guest_count,
  package_code:       $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.package_code,
  room_type:          $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.room_type,
  payment_choice:     $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.payment_choice,
  add_ons:            $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.add_ons,
  source:             'luna_whatsapp',
  selected_bed_codes: $('Code - Parse Booking Fields').first().json.selected_bed_codes,
  confirm:            true
}) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ dry_run: true, result: 'stripe_link_created', booking_code: $json.booking_code, payment_id: $json.payment_id, checkout_url: $json.checkout_url, amount_due_cents: $json.amount_due_cents, currency: $json.currency, payment_status: $json.payment_status, whatsapp_sent: false, no_payment_truth_recorded: true, reply_draft: $json.reply_draft, note: $json.note }) }}

main.node: Set - Log Missing Fields Reply DryRun
